query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.status, p.clientId, c.name as clientName, c.userId, c.email, c.whatsappPhone 
FROM projects p 
LEFT JOIN clients c ON p.clientId = c.id 
WHERE p.name LIKE '%alvaro%' OR p.name LIKE '%prueba%'
ORDER BY p.id DESC
LIMIT 5;
